NAVAREA XIX 113/14
BARENT SEA
SEISMIC SURVEY IN PROGRESS BY M/V RAMFORM EXPLORER IN AREA
BOUNDED BY:
A. 74-09N 034-15E.
B. 74-03N 033-53E.
C. 73-30N 035-45E.
D. 73-35N 036-08E.
VESSEL TOWING 10 X 7500 METERS SEISMIC CABLE.
WIDE BERTH OF FIVE NM CPA REQUESTED ASTERN, AND THREE NM FORWARD, PORT AND STARBOARD SIDES.
